sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20103" key="blefaroka/toxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βλεφᾰροκάτοχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n20103.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">holding the eyelid</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μυδίον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.8</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
